name: Powerbuilding 1.0 5-6x
description: Jeff Nippard's Powerbuilding System - 5-6x/week. An 11-week hybrid strength and hypertrophy program combining the Big 3 powerlifts with bodybuilding accessories. Odd weeks are 5 full-body workouts, even weeks are 6 workouts in an Upper/Lower split. Includes progressive overload across phases, a semi-deload week (week 6), max testing options (week 10A/10B), and a full deload (week 11).

Back Squat: Leg press + 15 reps of back extensions
Low-Bar Back Squat: Leg press + 15 reps of back extensions
Neck Flexion/Extension: Isometric yoga ball wall neck hold
Pause High-Bar Squat: Pause leg press + 15 reps of back extensions

phases.name: Hypertrophy / Accumulation
phases.description: Weeks 1-5: Progressive overload building phase with increasing intensity. Odd weeks (1,3,5) use 5 full-body sessions; even weeks (2,4) use 6 upper/lower sessions.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 75-80% 1RM. Focus on technique and explosive power!

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 70% 1RM. Keep back angle and form consistent across all reps

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 70% 1RM. Reset each rep (don't touch-and-press)

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: Helms Row
exercises.notes: Strict form. Drive elbows out and back at 45 degree angle

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Keep elbows locked in place, squeeze the dumbbell handle hard!

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Conventional or sumo: use whatever stance you are stronger with

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 82.5-87.5% 1RM. Top set. Leave 1 (maybe 2) reps in the tank. Hard set.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 67.5% 1RM. Quick 1 second pause on the chest on each rep

exercises.name: Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: Machine, band or weighted, 1 second isometric hold at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 1.5x shoulder width grip, pull your chest to the bar

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full ROM

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Maintain tight pressure in your upper back against the bar

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Do dumbbell floor press if no access to dip handles

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Lat Pull-Over
exercises.notes: Can use a DB, cable/rope or band, stretch and squeeze lats!

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.notes: Do each arm one at a time rather than alternating, start with your weak arm

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, retract your shoulder blades as you pull

exercises.name: Pause Deadlift
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. 3 second pause right after the plates come off the ground

exercises.name: Pause Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. 2-3 second pause on the chest

exercises.name: Chest-Supported T-Bar Row or Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Be mindful of lower back fatigue. Stay light, minimize cheating

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.notes: See video demos page, can sub for lying leg curl

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.notes: Feel a stretch on the traps at the bottom, squeeze hard at the top

exercises.name: A1: Barbell or EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Curl the bar out and up in an arc. Minimize momentum.

exercises.name: A2: Floor Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Arc the bar back behind your head, soft touch on the floor behind you

exercises.name: B1: Incline Dumbbell Curl (Reverse 21s)
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once: 7 reps full ROM, 7 reps top 1/2, 7 reps bottom 1/2

exercises.name: B2: Triceps Pressdown (Reverse 21s)
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once: 7 reps full ROM, 7 reps bottom 1/2, 7 reps top 1/2

exercises.name: C1: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: C2: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Mind-muscle connection with rear delts

exercises.name: C3: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: C4: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Focus on rounding your back as you crunch hard!

exercises.name: Neck Flexion/Extension (Optional)
exercises.notes: Avoid yanking the plate with your hands

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Sumo Box Squat or Pause High-Bar Squat
exercises.notes: If you squat high-bar, do sumo box squat. If you squat low-bar, do pause high-bar (2 sec pause)

exercises.name: Pull-Through
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, use your glutes to move the weight

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Do lying leg curl machine or Nordic ham curl if no machine access

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 85-90% 1RM. Top set. Leave ~2 reps in the tank. Hard set.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 77.5% 1RM. Set up a comfortable arch, slight pause on the chest, explode up

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.notes: Underhand grip, pull your chest to the bar, add weight if needed to hit RPE

exercises.name: Standing Arnold Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Rotate the DBs in at the bottom and out at the top

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Lie on an incline bench and do rows - pull with lats!

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, retract your shoulder blades as you pull

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: Concentration Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Pin your elbow against your upper leg or the back of a bench

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.notes: Same as squat stance, keep shins straight, go lighter and 'feel' hamstrings

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Emphasize the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walk or Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: Point toes slightly outward, mind-muscle connection with glutes

exercises.name: V Sit-Up
exercises.notes: Think about squeezing your upper and lower abs together

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Squeeze your glutes to keep your torso upright, press up and slightly back

exercises.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Perform with bands if no lat pulldown, drive elbows down and in

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder width grip, tuck your elbows in closer to your torso

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Be mindful of lower back fatigue. Stay light, minimize cheating

exercises.name: Pec Flye
exercises.notes: Perform with cable, bands or dumbbells, use a full ROM

exercises.name: A1: Incline Shrug
exercises.notes: Lie face down against an incline bench and do shrugs - full ROM and squeeze!

exercises.name: A2: Upright Row
exercises.notes: Can use cables/rope, bands or dumbbells. Stop ROM once elbows reach shoulder height.

exercises.name: Barbell Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Do these on a bench, constant tension on triceps

exercises.name: 5" Block Pull
exercises.notes: Do block pulls from a 5" block (can stack 45lb + 10lb bumper plates as blocks)

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg, keep your torso upright, constant-tension on quads

exercises.name: Barbell 45 Degree Hyperextension or Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Do barbell hip thrusts if no machine, use glutes to move the weight

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Do standing if no machine, emphasize the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Neck Flexion/Extension (Optional)
exercises.notes: 12 reps flexion (front of neck), 12 reps extension (back of neck)

exercises.name: Flat-Back Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Minimize leg drive.

exercises.name: Eccentric-Accentuated Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 3 second negative on every rep, maintain controlled form for all reps

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Do dumbbell floor press if no access to dip handles

exercises.name: Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Can use cables, bands or dumbbells - feel your lats working!

exercises.name: Barbell or EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Lean-Away Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Use a light dumbbell, constant-tension, no pause at the bottom

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Keep your hands behind your ears

exercises.notes: 72.5-77.5% 1RM. Top set. Leave 1 (maybe 2) reps in the tank. Push it!

phases.name: Semi-Deload
phases.description: Week 6: Avoid failure and train lighter to promote recovery and prepare for the next 4 weeks. Uses 6-day Upper/Lower split with reduced RPE.

weeks.note: Semi-deload week: Avoid failure and train lighter this week to promote recovery and to prepare for the next 4 weeks!

exercises.name: Flat-Back Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Minimize leg drive.

exercises.name: Neutral Grip Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Avoid failure, focus on good technique and maintaining consistent tempo

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Do dumbbell floor press if no access to dip handles

exercises.name: Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Can use cables, bands or dumbbells - feel your lats working!

exercises.name: Barbell or EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Lean-Away Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Use a light dumbbell, constant-tension, no pause at the bottom

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Keep your hands behind your ears

phases.name: Intensification / Peaking
phases.description: Weeks 7-9: Higher intensity phase building toward max testing. Odd weeks use 5 full-body sessions; even week 8 uses 6 upper/lower sessions.

weeks.note: Week 7 follows the same odd-week full body pattern as weeks 1, 3, 5 with progressively heavier loads. Refer to PDF for exact prescriptions.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 85-90% 1RM. Try to add some weight from week 5 or improve bar speed at same weight

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 85% 1RM. Be mindful of technique. Focus on driving your back into the bar.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 70% 1RM. Reset each rep (don't touch-and-press)

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: Helms Row
exercises.notes: Strict form. Drive elbows out and back at 45 degree angle

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Keep elbows locked in place, squeeze the dumbbell handle hard!

exercises.name: Pause Deadlift
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. 3 second pause right after the plates come off the ground

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 85-90% 1RM. Top set. Leave 1 rep in the tank. Aim for near 3 rep PR.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Focus on technique. Press the bar back and up with explosive force

exercises.name: Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: Machine, band or weighted, 1 second isometric hold at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 1.5x shoulder width grip, pull your chest to the bar

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full ROM

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 77.5% 1RM. Maintain tight pressure in your upper back against the bar

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Do dumbbell floor press if no access to dip handles

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Lat Pull-Over
exercises.notes: Can use a DB, cable/rope or band, stretch and squeeze lats!

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.notes: Do each arm one at a time rather than alternating, start with your weak arm

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, retract your shoulder blades as you pull

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 85-90% 1RM. Work up to a heavy triple with a load that hits RPE 8-9

exercises.name: Pause Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. 2-3 second pause on the chest

exercises.name: Chest-Supported T-Bar Row or Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Be mindful of lower back fatigue. Stay light, minimize cheating

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.notes: See video demos page, can sub for lying leg curl

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.notes: Feel a stretch on the traps at the bottom, squeeze hard at the top

exercises.name: A1: Barbell or EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Curl the bar out and up in an arc. Minimize momentum.

exercises.name: A2: Floor Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Arc the bar back behind your head, soft touch on the floor behind you

exercises.name: B1: Incline Dumbbell Curl (Reverse 21s)
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once: 7 reps full ROM, 7 reps top 1/2, 7 reps bottom 1/2

exercises.name: B2: Triceps Pressdown (Reverse 21s)
exercises.notes: Do both arms at once: 7 reps full ROM, 7 reps bottom 1/2, 7 reps top 1/2

exercises.name: C1: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: C2: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.notes: Mind-muscle connection with rear delts

exercises.name: C3: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: C4: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Focus on rounding your back as you crunch hard!

exercises.name: Neck Flexion/Extension (Optional)
exercises.notes: Avoid yanking the plate with your hands

weeks.note: Even week - 6-day Upper/Lower split. See PDF pages for exact prescriptions for Lower #1, Upper #1, Lower #2, Upper #2, Lower #3, Upper #3.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Sumo Box Squat or Pause High-Bar Squat
exercises.notes: If you squat high-bar, do sumo box squat. If you squat low-bar, do pause high-bar (2 sec pause)

exercises.name: Pull-Through
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, use your glutes to move the weight

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Do lying leg curl machine or Nordic ham curl if no machine access

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 77.5% 1RM. Set up a comfortable arch, slight pause on the chest, explode up

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.notes: Underhand grip, pull your chest to the bar, add weight if needed to hit RPE

exercises.name: Standing Arnold Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Rotate the DBs in at the bottom and out at the top

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Lie on an incline bench and do rows - pull with lats!

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, retract your shoulder blades as you pull

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: Concentration Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Pin your elbow against your upper leg or the back of a bench

exercises.name: Low-Bar Back Squat
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.notes: Same as squat stance, keep shins straight, go lighter and 'feel' hamstrings

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Emphasize the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walk or Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: Point toes slightly outward, mind-muscle connection with glutes

exercises.name: V Sit-Up
exercises.notes: Think about squeezing your upper and lower abs together

exercises.name: Neck Flexion/Extension (Optional)
exercises.notes: 12 reps flexion (front of neck), 12 reps extension (back of neck)

exercises.name: Overhead Press / Push Press
exercises.notes: 82.5% 1RM. First 3 reps strict military press (no leg drive), last 3 reps push press (use leg drive)

exercises.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Perform with bands if no lat pulldown, drive elbows down and in

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Press
exercises.notes: 45 degree incline, keep shoulder blades retracted and depressed

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Be mindful of lower back fatigue. Stay light, minimize cheating

exercises.name: Pec Flye
exercises.notes: Perform with cable, bands or dumbbells, use a full ROM

exercises.name: A1: Incline Shrug
exercises.notes: Lie face down against an incline bench and do shrugs - full ROM and squeeze!

exercises.name: A2: Bent Over Reverse Dumbbell Flye
exercises.notes: Mind-muscle connection with rear delts, sweep the weight out

exercises.name: Barbell Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Do these on a bench, constant tension on triceps

exercises.name: 2" Block Pull
exercises.notes: Do block pulls from a 2" block (can use 25lb bumper plate as blocks)

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: 12 reps each leg, keep your torso upright, constant-tension on quads

exercises.name: Barbell 45 Degree Hyperextension or Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Do barbell hip thrusts if no machine, use glutes to move the weight

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Do standing if no machine, emphasize the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Neck Flexion/Extension (Optional)
exercises.notes: 12 reps flexion (front of neck), 12 reps extension (back of neck)

exercises.name: Flat-Back Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder blades still retracted and depressed. Slight arch in upper back. Minimize leg drive.

exercises.name: Eccentric-Accentuated Pull-Up
exercises.notes: 3 second negative on every rep, maintain controlled form for all reps

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Do dumbbell floor press if no access to dip handles

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Keep your hands behind your ears

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 87.5-92.5% 1RM. Top set. Leave 1 (maybe 2) reps in the tank. Aim for near 2 rep PR.

exercises.name: Squat Walk-Out (Do Not Squat)
exercises.notes: 100% 1RM. Do not squat. Walk the weight out, hold and walk back in. Set the safety pins high and have a spotter.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 80% 1RM. Reset each rep (don't touch-and-press)

phases.name: Max Testing
phases.description: Week 10: Choose Option A (bodybuilding/strength goals) or Option B (competitive powerlifting). Do not run both.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 90% 1RM. As many reps as possible. Always use a spotter and good form. Aim to hit 3+ reps

exercises.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Perform with bands if no lat pulldown, drive elbows down and in

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 90% 1RM. As many reps as possible. Always use a spotter and good form. Aim to hit 3+ reps

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Do lying leg curl machine or Nordic ham curl if no machine access

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Can do with cables or bands, squeeze triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 90% 1RM. As many reps as possible. Always use good form. Aim to hit 3+ reps

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Reset each rep (don't touch-and-press)

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Focus on rounding your back as you crunch hard!

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 100-105% 1RM. Aim for a new PR. Start with 100% and increase by ~2.5% every attempt until you hit a 9.5 RPE. Use a spotter and good form!

exercises.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Perform with bands if no lat pulldown, drive elbows down and in

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 100-105% 1RM. Aim for a new PR. Start with 100% and increase by ~2.5% every attempt until you hit a 9.5 RPE. Use a spotter and good form!

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Do lying leg curl machine or Nordic ham curl if no machine access

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Can do with cables or bands, squeeze triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 100-105% 1RM. Aim for a new PR. Start with 100% and increase by ~2.5% every attempt. 5-min rest between attempts. Use good form!

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: Reset each rep (don't touch-and-press)

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.notes: Focus on rounding your back as you crunch hard!

phases.name: Deload
phases.description: Week 11: Full deload week. Avoid failure and train lighter this week before running back through week 1 or onto a new program.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. Brace your lats, chest tall, pull the slack out of the bar before lifting

exercises.name: Sumo Box Squat or Pause High-Bar Squat
exercises.notes: If you squat high-bar, do sumo box squat. If you squat low-bar, do pause high-bar (2 sec pause)

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Do lying leg curl machine or Nordic ham curl if no machine access

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: 1-2 second pause at the bottom of each rep, full squeeze at the top

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: 72.5% 1RM. Set up a comfortable arch, slight pause on the chest, explode up

exercises.name: Assisted Chin-Up
exercises.notes: Underhand grip, pull your chest to the bar, add weight if needed to hit RPE

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.notes: 75% 1RM. Squeeze your glutes to keep your torso upright, press up and slightly back

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Lie on an incline bench and do rows - pull with lats!

exercises.name: A1: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Can use cable/rope or band, retract your shoulder blades as you pull

exercises.name: A2: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbell out, mind-muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: B1: Concentration Bicep Curl
exercises.notes: Pin your elbow against your upper leg or the back of a bench

exercises.name: B2: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Can do with cables or bands, squeeze triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: 70% 1RM. Sit back and down, keep your upper back tight to the bar

exercises.name: Snatch-Grip Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Wide grip, mind-muscle connection with hamstrings

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Use bands if no machine access, mind-muscle connection with quads

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Emphasize the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walk or Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: Point toes slightly outward, mind-muscle connection with glutes

exercises.name: V Sit-Up
exercises.notes: Think about squeezing your upper and lower abs together

exercises.name: Neck Flexion/Extension (Optional)
exercises.notes: 12 reps flexion (front of neck), 12 reps extension (back of neck)

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Shoulder width grip, tuck your elbows in closer to your torso

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Lie on an incline bench and do rows - pull with lats!

exercises.name: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes: Do floor dumbbell press if no access to dip handles

exercises.name: Single-Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Perform with bands if no lat pulldown, drive elbows down and in

exercises.name: A1: Incline Shrug
exercises.notes: Lie against an incline bench and do shrugs - full ROM and squeeze!

exercises.name: A2: Upright Row
exercises.notes: Can use cables/rope, bands or dumbbells. Stop ROM once elbows reach shoulder height.

exercises.name: B1: Barbell or EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on the mind-muscle connection

exercises.name: B2: Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Barbell or EZ bar, do these on a bench, constant tension on triceps
